_publications._publicationTitle: Susceptible stages in Schwann cells for NF1-associated plexiform neurofibroma development.

_contextSnippet: Two out of nineteen Atam;PLPCre-ERT2;NF1 flox/− ;R26R mice were sacrificed in their second year of life when they developed signs of sickness including lethargy, ruffled hair, weight loss, and limb paralysis
details: Only 2 out of 19 (10.5%) adult tamoxifen-induced PLPCre-ERT2;NF1 flox/− mice developed plexiform neurofibromas in their second year of life
